basis.ordering: lexicographic product over I, X, Y, Z

coefficient_convention.coefficient_formula: Qiskit SparsePauliOp coefficients, with labels in matrix tensor-product order
coefficient_convention.stored_terms: Only coefficients with abs(C_P) > drop_tol are stored.

source.dense_usage: None; Qiskit SparsePauliOp terms are exported directly.
source.initial_construction: computational-basis diagonal projection, keeping only I/Z Pauli strings
